assertions.title: About, Projects, and Contact routes render canonical page headings
assertions.reasoning: Navigation through top-nav loaded /about, /projects, and /contact successfully; each page exposed exactly one visible h1 and the heading text matched required tokens.

steps.action: From home, click About in top navigation
steps.expected: URL is /about and exactly one non-empty h1 includes 'about'
URL is /projects and exactly one non-empty h1 includes 'project'
URL is /contact and exactly one non-empty h1 includes 'contact' or 'get in touch'

assertions.title: About page includes resume-style structure
assertions.reasoning: About page main content contained a summary paragraph longer than 40 characters and at least two resume-style sections with heading + body items.

steps.action: Open /about and inspect main content structure
steps.expected: At least one summary paragraph (>=40 chars) plus >=2 resume-style sections with visible headings and non-empty content
steps.observed: summaryFound=true, summaryLength=176; sectionsWithBody=[Skills(3), Experience Highlights(3), Education & Learning(1)]

assertions.title: Projects page entries are scannable and actionable
assertions.reasoning: Projects page rendered multiple entries with non-empty titles/descriptions; all visible links had valid actionable href values and were keyboard-focusable; keyboard Enter activation opened the Repository link in a new tab with no uncaught runtime errors.

steps.expected: At least one entry with title + description; every visible link has valid href and keyboard focusability
steps.observed: entryCount=3; 3 visible links all valid=true and keyboardFocusable=true

steps.expected: Link activates without uncaught runtime errors
steps.observed: New tab opened to https://github.com/factory-ai; errors check returned none

entries.title: Minimalist Portfolio + Blog
entries.description: Selected work focused on developer experience, clean UI systems, and practical delivery quality across desktop and mobile screens.

entries.title: Minimalist Portfolio + Blog
entries.description: Built an Astro-based portfolio shell with dark-theme design tokens, responsive navigation, and structured content routes for resume pages and blog expansion.

entries.title: Accessible UI System Starter
entries.description: Created a reusable component baseline with consistent spacing, keyboard focus states, and typography rules for long-form readability.

assertions.title: Contact page provides actionable methods
assertions.reasoning: Contact page exposed multiple actionable contact methods (mailto and https profile links), each keyboard-focusable; keyboard activation on LinkedIn link worked and opened target URL with no runtime errors.

steps.action: Open /contact and inspect available contact methods
steps.expected: At least one valid actionable method (`mailto:`, `https://`, or form submission path)
steps.observed: Found 3 valid methods: mailto:hello@example.com, https://www.linkedin.com/, https://github.com/

steps.action: Focus LinkedIn contact link and press Enter
steps.expected: Keyboard activation succeeds without uncaught runtime errors
steps.observed: New tab opened to https://www.linkedin.com/; errors check returned none

assertions.title: Readability baseline is satisfied on desktop and mobile
assertions.reasoning: Across About/Projects/Contact at desktop (1280px) and mobile (390px), all checks passed: no page-level horizontal overflow, body text >=16px, line-height ratio >=1.4, and constrained content width <=1000px or matching constrained max-width.

steps.expected: overflow OK, font-size >=16, line-height >=1.4, constrained main/content width
steps.observed: All desktop checks passed on all three routes

steps.expected: overflow OK, font-size >=16, line-height >=1.4, constrained main/content width
steps.observed: All mobile checks passed on all three routes

frictions.description: PowerShell shell in this environment does not support '&&' chaining for agent-browser commands.
frictions.resolution: Used ';' separators for sequential agent-browser commands in the same session.

summary: Tested 5 assertions for foundation-shell pages group: 5 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
